/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: BOTH COUNSEL MADE THE FOLLOWING STIPULATIONS ON THE RECORD:/X: STIPULATION 1: IN PEOPLE VS, BERNON ANDERSON, CASE #2311227, DEFENDANT WAS CHARGES WITH MURDER AND WAS TRIED AND CONVICTED,/X: STIPULATION 2: SERGEANT TONEY CHAPLIN CONDUCTED A PROBATION SEARCH  AT JARED WILSON'S RESIDENCE, 131 BRIGHT STREET, AND FOUND EXHIBITS 1 AND 2 (DESCRIBEDBELOW)/X: STIPULATION 3: THE COURT TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE TRIAL TESTIMONYTRANSCRIPT AND GRAND JURY TRANSCRIPT OF JARED WILSON (MARKED AS EXHIBITS 3 AND 4/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER BARRY PARKER, SFPD/WIT SWORN D:ADA, HARRY DORFMAN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1:RAP LYRICS, 3 PAGES/EXHMA: PEOPLE'SEXHIBIT 2:ROSTER/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 3:TRIAL TESTIMONY TRANSCRIPT OFJARED WILSON/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 4: GRAND JURY TRANSCRIPT/EXHMA :PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 5: CERTIFY MINUTE ORDER, INFORMATION, CHANGE OF PLEA FOR KEONBISHOP, CASE#2418039, AND JARED WILSON, CASE #2418067/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 6:SIGNED AGREEMENT TO SPECIAL CONDITIONS/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 7:REGISTRATION AS GANG MEMBER/EXHMA: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT A: MAP/EXHMA: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT B: JARED WILSON'S RESUME/EXHMA: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT C: REFERENCE LETTER FROM ARRIBA JUNTOS/EXHMA: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT D: REFERENCE LETTER FROM YM&M JANITORIAL/DEFT WV CPX/X:PEOPLE'S MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF HOLDING ORDERS ON COUNT 2 AND GANG ENHANCEMENTS FILED,/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING (ARGUEMENTS AND RULING ONLY)/DOP/
